tagline: AI-based smart guide for lakes, sunrise, food, and adventure

top_highlights.name: Bat Cave
top_highlights.why_best: Interesting cave filled with thousands of bats at dusk.

top_highlights.name: Pumdikot Shiva Statue
top_highlights.why_best: Huge Shiva statue with wide panoramic mountain and city views.

top_highlights.name: Australian Camp Hike

best_places.name: Bat Cave
best_places.why_best: Interesting cave filled with thousands of bats at dusk.
best_places.safety_note: Prefer trusted transport and stay in well-lit routes.
best_places.historical_formation: Bat Cave in Pokhara has layered local history. Its landscape was formed by Himalayan geology and water systems, and local communities adapted their lifestyle around seasonal patterns. Today it connects tourists with community memory through food, rituals, architecture, and daily street life.

best_places.name: Pumdikot Shiva Statue
best_places.why_best: Huge Shiva statue with wide panoramic mountain and city views.
best_places.safety_note: Prefer trusted transport and stay in well-lit routes.
best_places.historical_formation: Pumdikot Shiva Statue in Pokhara has layered local history. This viewpoint emerged from older walking and grazing paths, later becoming a known public lookout for sunrise, navigation, and festivals. Today it connects tourists with community memory through food, rituals, architecture, and daily street life.

best_places.name: Australian Camp Hike
best_places.why_best: Short but scenic hill hike with Annapurna range views.
best_places.safety_note: Prefer trusted transport and stay in well-lit routes.
best_places.historical_formation: Australian Camp Hike in Pokhara has layered local history. Originally a local movement trail for villages and pasture access, it gradually transitioned into a trekking corridor for visitors. Today it connects tourists with community memory through food, rituals, architecture, and daily street life.

best_places.name: World Peace Pagoda
best_places.why_best: Iconic hilltop pagoda with panoramic views of Pokhara and the Annapurna range.
best_places.safety_note: Prefer trusted transport and stay in well-lit routes.
best_places.historical_formation: World Peace Pagoda in Pokhara has layered local history. Local records and community memory describe it as a long-standing civic and spiritual core, expanded through royal-era patronage and traditional trade movement. Today it connects tourists with community memory through food, rituals, architecture, and daily street life.

city_profile.lifestyle: Relaxed lakeside rhythm with adventure sports by day and cafe music at night.
local_connect_tips: Carry a light layer for evening lake breeze.

safety_checklist: Avoid carrying all cash in one place.
Keep offline map and hotel contact ready.
Use marked ATMs and avoid isolated lanes at night.

verified_fare_ranges: Ride-share short trip normal range: NPR 250-560
Taxi short trip normal range: NPR 350-900
scam_red_flags: Driver refuses meter and demands price far above local range.
Someone pushes you to switch to an unmarked vehicle or unofficial guide.
Restaurant/agent avoids printed bill or adds hidden service charges.
Street currency exchange offers rates that are too good to be true.
safe_actions: Confirm price before ride/food order and re-check at payment time.
Use app-based rides or hotel-booked transport at night.
Pay with small notes and avoid exposing full cash wallet.
Choose busy, well-reviewed restaurants and licensed ticket counters.
report_steps: Call Tourist Police 1144 for overcharging or harassment.
Note plate number/business name and keep receipt screenshot.
Share route and fare details with hotel/front desk for support.

budget.notes: Mostly public transport, local eateries, and low ticket-cost spots.

standard.notes: Mix of ride-share and public transport with balanced dining.

premium.notes: Taxi-first mobility, premium cafes/restaurants, and comfort-focused pacing.
